personal.name: Lucien Kalmogo
personal.title: AI Engineer & Data Scientist
personal.subtitle: NLP · Computer Vision · Generative AI · Healthcare AI

bio_short.en: AI Engineer & Data Scientist building end-to-end AI systems — NLP pipelines, computer vision, generative AI and knowledge representation, applied to complex real-world problems.
bio_short.fr: AI Engineer & Data Scientist, je conçois des systèmes d'IA de bout en bout — pipelines NLP, vision par ordinateur, IA générative et représentation des connaissances, appliqués à des problèmes concrets.

bio_long.en: I design and build practical AI systems, with experience spanning the full ML pipeline — from data collection and preprocessing to model deployment and evaluation. My background covers NLP (information extraction, LLMs, clinical text), computer vision (detection, recognition, generative models), knowledge representation (ontologies, semantic web), and web development (Django, REST APIs). I enjoy working on projects where technology solves concrete, real-world problems.
bio_long.fr: Je conçois et développe des systèmes d'IA concrets, avec une expérience couvrant tout le pipeline ML — de la collecte et du prétraitement des données jusqu'au déploiement et à l'évaluation des modèles. Mon parcours couvre le NLP (extraction d'information, LLMs, texte clinique), la vision par ordinateur (détection, reconnaissance, modèles génératifs), la représentation des connaissances (ontologies, web sémantique) et le développement web (Django, API REST). J'aime les projets où la technologie résout des problèmes réels et mesurables.

also_open_to.en: PhD opportunities in applied AI for health
also_open_to.fr: Opportunités de doctorat en IA appliquée à la santé

degree.en: M2 Artificial Intelligence for Public Health (AI4PH)
degree.fr: M2 Intelligence Artificielle appliquée à la Santé Publique (AI4PH)

experience.title: Research Intern — NLP & Ontology Alignment
experience.description: Developed CBAG framework for consensus-based ontology alignment in the One Health domain. Implemented and benchmarked 4 matching systems + LLM validation (Qwen3-8B). Submitted paper to WISE 2026.
highlights: Designed consensus voting + LLM validation pipeline
Evaluated on 6 OAEI benchmark pairs — best F1 on 5/6
Applied to 25 One Health biomedical ontologies

experience.title: Full-Stack AI Developer — Freelance
experience.description: Designed and developed an AI-powered computer recommendation platform using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) with Django and OpenAI GPT.
highlights: Implemented RAG pipeline (database retrieval + GPT validation)
User authentication + product catalog + AI recommendations

experience.title: AI Trainer — Community
experience.description: Delivered a Data Science with Python training session for the Zindi Africa community, invited by a Zindi Ambassador. Covered Python fundamentals through neural networks from scratch.
highlights: Implemented Perceptron and Neural Network from scratch (NumPy)
Training material publicly available on GitHub
